zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven於1490年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特普林哈時，他的父親Mathijs Peter Dirven37歲，母親Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken35歲。他於1526年與Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年在荷蘭努-布拉班特布雷達享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dirven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kirwan  . Now found chiefly in Lancashire, England.

variants.name: Kirwan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Brendan, Ronan.

Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardhubháin ‘descendant of Ciardhubhán’, a personal name based on ciar ‘dark’ + dubh ‘black’ + the diminutive suffix -an. This name and its variants are also found in Lancashire, England (see Kirvan , Kirven , Kirvin , Kirwin ). Compare Carawan .

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: The Netherlands is inherited by the future Habsburg Emperor and King of Spain Charles V.
The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven was born in 1490, in Princenhage, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Mathijs Peter Dirven, was 37 and his mother, Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken, was 35. He married Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden in 1526. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1555, in Breda, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven est né en 1490, à Princenhage, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Mathijs Peter Dirven, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden en 1526. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1555, à Breda, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven 1490 in Princenhage, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathijs Peter Dirven 37 und seine Mutter Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken 35. Er hat 1526 Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1555 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Breda, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven è nato il nel 1490 nel Princenhage, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Mathijs Peter Dirven, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden nel 1526. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1555, nel Breda, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirvenが1490年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントプリンセンハッジで生まれた時，父Mathijs Peter Dirvenは37歳，母Anthonia Bouden van der Veekenは35歳であった。1526年にAdriane Jansdr van den Beemdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントブレダで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven(이)가 1490년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 프린스하지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathijs Peter Dirven(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1526년 Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 브레다에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven nasceu em 1490, em Princenhage, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Mathijs Peter Dirven, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden em 1526. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1555, em Breda, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Mathijsz Peter Dirven родился в 1490 г. в местности принценадж, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Mathijs Peter Dirven было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anthonia Bouden van der Veeken, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden в 1526 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1555 г. в местности бреда, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 65 лет.

Se casó con Adriane Jansdr van den Beemden en 1526. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1555, en Breda, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 65 años.
